title: citrus hystrix var. microcarpa
intro: Citrus hystrix var. microcarpa, also known as the microcarp kaffir lime or microcarp kaffir lime tree, is a variant of the kaffir lime tree (Citrus hystrix), a species of citrus native to Southeast Asia. The plant's leaves and fruit are rich in essential oils, particularly limonene and beta-pinene, which possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The leaves and fruits of Citrus hystrix var. microcarpa have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections, due to their antiviral, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to promote digestive health, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system.
